CareGraph

CareGraph

Public CMS Data

CareGraph stitches together public CMS datasets and gives you convenient links to access data about entities. Free, no ads, no login.

Press Enter to search 26,315 entities.

Explore by entity

Hospitals SNFs Counties ACOs Drugs Conditions DRGs Clinicians

Sample pages

5,426 hospitals, 14,703 SNFs, 3,198 counties, 476 ACOs, 1,938 drugs, 40 conditions, and 534 DRGs loaded.

  • SOUTHEAST HEALTH MEDICAL CENTER (010001)
  • UNKNOWN, AL (01000)
  • BURNS NURSING HOME, INC. (015009)
  • PBACO Holding, LLC (A1001)
  • 0.9 % SODIUM CHLORIDE (0-9-sodium-chloride)
  • Current lack of health insurance among adults aged 18-64 years (ACCESS2)
  • DRG 001: HEART TRANSPLANT OR IMPLANT OF HEART ASSIST SYSTEM

Data freshness

Current data sources: Hospital General Information, Hospital Readmissions Reduction Program, Hospital Value-Based Purchasing, Nursing Home Provider Info, MSSP ACO Performance, Medicare Geographic Variation by County, CDC PLACES County-Level Data, Medicare Part D Spending by Drug, Medicare Part B Spending by Drug, Medicare Part B Discarded Drug Units, Medicare Inpatient Hospitals by Provider and Service (DRG). Last ETL run: 2026-04-13. Full vintage table (Methodology Hub) →
